patch:
diff --git a/.airlock/config.yml b/.airlock/config.yml
index 793b549..4d3dbf7 100644
--- a/.airlock/config.yml
+++ b/.airlock/config.yml
@@ -10,19 +10,20 @@ pipeline:
         echo "Base: $AIRLOCK_BASE_SHA"
         echo "Head: $AIRLOCK_HEAD_SHA"
         # Create a simple description artifact
-        airlock artifact content description.md << CONTENT
+        cat << CONTENT | airlock artifact content --title "PR Description"
         ## Changes in $AIRLOCK_BRANCH
         
         This push contains changes ready for review.
         
-        **Base commit:** \`$AIRLOCK_BASE_SHA\`
-        **Head commit:** \`$AIRLOCK_HEAD_SHA\`
+        **Base commit:** \`$(echo $AIRLOCK_BASE_SHA | cut -c1-7)\`
+        **Head commit:** \`$(echo $AIRLOCK_HEAD_SHA | cut -c1-7)\`
         CONTENT
 
     # Simple test stage
     - name: test
       run: |
         echo "Running tests..."
+        sleep 1
         echo "All tests passed!"
 
     # Pause for user review before pushing
diff --git a/src/database.ts b/src/database.ts
index 0f4d0ba..aacbff5 100644
--- a/src/database.ts
+++ b/src/database.ts
@@ -13,16 +13,3 @@ export async function query<T>(sql: string, params?: any[]): Promise<T[]> {
     client.release();
   }
 }
-
-export async function getUser(id: string) {
-  const users = await query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1', [id]);
-  return users[0] || null;
-}
-
-export async function createUser(email: string, name: string) {
-  const result = await query(
-    'INSERT INTO users (email, name) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING *',
-    [email, name]
-  );
-  return result[0];
-}
